site.title: Anonymous Visual Comparison
site.subtitle: Qualitative comparison page for rebuttal, including reconstruction and generation results.

sections.title: Reconstruction
sections.description: Edit site_config/reconstruction_display_order.json to control which image appears in each display slot.

sections.title: Generation
sections.description: Files are first sorted by modification time, then reordered by site_config/generation_display_order.json.
